subject: feat(projects): add screenshot support with fallback chain
body:
Adds portrait screenshot display to project cards in a horizontal
layout — image on the left, text content on the right. Designed for
phone-captured portrait screenshots that work well in both the web
view and PDF download.

Fallback chain: screenshot image → Google Favicon API → initials
placeholder. ProjectImage component handles the cascade with onError
transitions between stages.

Layout changed from 3-column vertical cards to 2-column horizontal
cards to accommodate the image panel. Print styles cap screenshot
height for compact PDF output.

New files:
- src/components/ProjectImage.tsx (fallback image component)
- public/screenshots/ (directory for screenshot assets)

Tags: projects, screenshots, ui, layout
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: project-screenshots
Semver: minor
title: add screenshot support with fallback chain
